g.text: The subject property consists of one parcel with a total site area of 24,400 SF (0.56 AC) which is based on
information obtained from ICS. For the purposes of this report, we have relied on this site area and reserve the
right to amend our analysis upon receipt of a formal legal plan. The following summarizes the salient
Access to the subject site is considered average overall.
1101, 1121 109 St, North Battleford, Saskatchewan | File VAL251012 - 1
